Table of Contents

Interface INetworkForwardStarSetup

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the configuration for this NetworkForwardStar object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D68A2A0C-F2B9-47AF-8AE6-811513349546")]
public interface INetworkForwardStarSetup

Properties

Backtrack

Policy on when to return the from-edge in the NetworkForwardStarAdjacencies object.

esriNetworkForwardStarBacktrack Backtrack { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkForwardStarBacktrack

Examples

Sample Snippet

HierarchyAttribute

Network attribute containing the hierarchy values for each network element.

INetworkAttribute HierarchyAttribute { get; set; }

Property Value

INetworkAttribute

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsForwardTraversal

Indicates if the NetworkForwardStar object is used to model forward traversal through the network dataset.

bool IsForwardTraversal { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxHierarchyValue

Maximum hierarchy attribute value permitted to be returned in the NetworkForwardStarAdjacencies object.

int MaxHierarchyValue { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NetworkDataset

Network dataset on which the NetworkForwardStar object is querying.

INetworkDataset NetworkDataset { get; }

Property Value

INetworkDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

NonTraversableElements[esriNetworkElementType, esriNetworkEdgeDirection]

The collection of network elements of the given type that are set to not traversable.

IEnumNetworkElement NonTraversableElements[esriNetworkElementType ElementType, esriNetworkEdgeDirection Direction] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriNetworkElementType
Direction esriNetworkEdgeDirection

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

Restriction network attribute by index applied to the NetworkForwardStar object.

INetworkAttribute Restriction[int Index] { get; }

Index int

Property Value

INetworkAttribute

RestrictionCount

Number of restriction network attributes applied to the NetworkForwardStar object.

int RestrictionCount { get; }

int

Traversable[INetworkElement]

Indicates if the given network element is travserable by the NetworkForwardStar object.

bool Traversable[INetworkElement Element] { get; set; }

SetAllTraversable(esriNetworkElementType, bool)

Sets all network elements of the given element type to be traversable or non-traversable.

void SetAllTraversable(esriNetworkElementType ElementType, bool Traversable)

ElementType esriNetworkElementType
Traversable bool
